niche.why_this_niche: Etsy search data shows outdoor lifestyle apparel has consistent demand with low saturation. 'Lake life' and fishing-themed designs rank well and are evergreen, not seasonal. Aligns with KC's existing Camp Cook Kitchens brand. No copyright risk since we use only original typography and illustrations — no copyrighted characters, brand names, or fan art.
niche.target_audience: Outdoor enthusiasts aged 28–55, skews Midwest/Mountain West. People who fish, camp, kayak, and spend time at lakes. They buy gifts for themselves and others. They respond to authentic, low-key branding — not corporate or preachy.
risk_notes: Must not use brand names (Garmin, YETI, Patagonia) or team logos (NFL, MLB, NCAA)
Must not use trademarked phrases like 'Lake Life' in generic tag combos
Must disclose AI-assisted design creation on Etsy listings per Etsy's AI policy
Must list Printify as production partner on every listing

brand.brand_voice: Rugged, honest, knowledgeable — like a fishing buddy who's done it. Not preachy, not corporate. We speak from experience. Dry humor beats motivational quotes.
brand.visual_style: Original minimalist illustrations + handcrafted typography. Mountain skylines, lake silhouettes, campfire scenes, fish silhouettes — never photorealistic. Clean, limited color runs. Think vintage national park poster meets modern outdoor brand.
brand.mission_statement: Equipping the lake-and-trail crowd with gear worth trusting. Original designs made to last, sourced from people who actually get outside.

catalog.target_customer: Trout fishing and lake camping crowd
catalog.margin_notes: DTG via Printify, ~61% gross margin. Size range up to 3XL adds appeal for broader market.
Lighter colorway = different buyer segment, expands catalog without new design.

catalog.product_name: Keep the Fire Lit Campfire Hoodie
catalog.target_customer: Campers, evening by the lake crowd
catalog.margin_notes: Premium product, strong gift item. Screen print cheaper per unit at scale.

catalog.target_customer: Lake lifestyle buyers, casual outdoor crowd
catalog.margin_notes: Broad appeal, strong gift. 'Lake days' phrasing performs well in Etsy search.
Niche-enabling design, less competitive than general fishing. Strong seasonal lift expected.

catalog.target_customer: Campfire cooking enthusiast, connects to Camp Cook brand
catalog.margin_notes: Links to existing Camp Cook Kitchens brand. Lower competition in Etsy cooking apparel.
Home goods category on Etsy = high buyer intent. One design, two pillowcases.
Lower price point = easier first purchase. Canvas tote performs consistently on Etsy.

catalog.product_type: Knit beanie with embroidered or printed patch
catalog.margin_notes: Embroidery on Printify has good results. One-size-fits-most reduces SKUs.

catalog.target_customer: Coffee culture outdoor buyers, gift market
catalog.margin_notes: Gift-ready, low return rate. Sublimation yields clean print on curved surface.

listings.title: Mountain Lake Outdoor T-Shirt — Fishing and Camping Apparel — Unisex

• Machine washable

Designed for the person who'd rather be at the lake. Makes a solid gift for the fisherman, camper, or outdoor person in your life.

Production partner: Printed and fulfilled by Printify
Processing: 3–5 business days before shipment

etsy_setup_steps: 1. Create Etsy seller account at etsy.com. Choose 'Physical goods' shop type.
2. Set up shop name as 'Highwater Supply Co.' or approved alternative.
3. Under Shop Manager > Settings > Planning for the future: enable 'This shop uses a production partner'.
4. Add Printify as production partner: Printify's name and address: Printify Inc., 15000 NW 22nd St, Miami, FL 33169. This satisfies Etsy's production partner disclosure requirement.
5. Create shipping profiles: Domestic Economy (5–8 business days), International Standard (10–15 business days). Set processing time to 3–5 business days.
6. Set up 2–3 shop sections: Apparel, Home & Camp, Accessories.
8. Write and publish shop policies (refund, fulfillment, responsibilities).
printify_setup_steps: 1. Create Printify account at printify.com. Connect to Etsy via Integrations > Etsy.
2. Authorize the Etsy connection — Printify will sync with your Etsy shop.
3. Browse Printify catalog: focus on Bella+Canvas, Gildan, and Next Level apparel providers for best quality-to-price.
4. For each product, use Printify's built-in mockup generator to create product images. Apply design to front center.
5. Set pricing: use 'Markup by cost' formula — cost × 2.5 = retail price minimum.
6. Push products to Etsy via Printify's 'Publish to Etsy' button. Sync automatically creates draft listings.
7. In Etsy, review draft listings, add descriptions and tags, then publish.
production_partner_notes: Printify must be listed as production partner on every listing per Etsy policy.
Production partner address to list in Etsy: Printify Inc., 15000 NW 22nd St, Miami, FL 33169.
Etsy requires disclosure: 'Made by Printify' or similar in the listing description.
Keep processing time at 3–5 business days. Printify's typical fulfillment is 2–7 days.
order_routing_notes: When an Etsy order is placed, Etsy sends order details to Printify automatically via integration.
Printify's print provider prints and ships within their stated SLA (usually 2–5 business days).
Customer receives tracking number via email — Printify handles fulfillment and customer notifications.
No manual order routing needed. Monitor Printify dashboard for any rejected or quality holds.
shipping_notes: Set domestic shipping: $4.50 Economy (5–8 days) as base, $1 per additional item.
Free shipping threshold at $45 domestic — drives average order value up.

launch_assets.shop_banner_copy: Gear for the lake-and-trail crowd. Original designs, printed on real stuff.
launch_assets.shop_about_copy:
Highwater Supply Co. was born from too many trips where the right shirt wasn't available — the one that fit right, said something real, and didn't look like a corporate ad.

We make outdoor lifestyle apparel for people who actually get outside. Fishermen, campers, lake people, trail people. The stuff we make is the stuff we want to wear.

Every design is original. Every product is fulfilled by Printify, a print-on-demand partner we trust.

Questions or custom requests? Message us anytime.

faq.a: We make each item to order. Processing takes 3–5 business days, then shipping is added on top. Domestic orders typically arrive in 7–12 days total.

faq.q: Do you offer custom sizes or personalization?
faq.a: Yes. Most items can be customized with a name, date, or short phrase on the back. Add a note at checkout or message us before ordering.
We accept returns on unworn, unwashed items within 14 days of delivery. Exchanges available for different sizes. Custom personalized items are final sale unless defective.

faq.q: Who makes and ships my order?
faq.a: Orders are produced and shipped by Printify, our print-on-demand production partner. Everything is made to order, just for you.
Yes. You'll receive a tracking number by email once your order ships. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive within the stated processing window.
Yes. International shipping starts at $12.50 and delivery times vary by country. Customs and duties are the responsibility of the buyer.

policy_points: Processing time: 3–5 business days before shipment (Printify fulfills on our behalf).
Returns accepted on unworn/unwashed items within 14 days. Customer pays return shipping unless defective.
Personalized items are final sale unless there is a production error.
Production partner: Printify Inc., Miami FL.
Shipping delays beyond 5 business days? Message us — we track it down.

workflow_ideas: All orders auto-sync from Etsy to Printify — no manual intervention required for standard fulfillment.
Use Printify's 'Auto-reorder' for reprints if a customer reports a quality issue.
Set up Etsy email templates for: Order confirmed, Shipment notification, Delivery confirmation.
Use Etsy Rank or Everbee to monitor listing performance and adjust keywords monthly.
Re-list sold-out seasonal designs each spring — same listing, new inventory.
approval_points: Review all customer messages within 4 hours during business hours.
Review every order before it goes to Printify — spot-check sizing and address.
Check Printify quality dashboard weekly — flag any rejected prints immediately.
Monthly keyword audit on top 5 listings — update tags if search volume shifts.
scaling_steps: 1. Launch with 6–10 listings, monitor which designs drive most sales.
2. Expand catalog to 20 listings once top sellers are identified.
3. Add seasonal lines (e.g., 'Trout Season Opens' shirt each spring).
4. Test pricing at +10% on best sellers before discounting.
5. Consider a second Etsy shop or expansion to Shopify if volume justifies.

launch_checklist: Create Etsy seller account and name shop 'Highwater Supply Co.'
Set up Printify account and connect to Etsy via Integrations
Add Printify as production partner in Etsy settings
Write and publish shop policies (refund, shipping, responsibilities)
Write 'About' page copy and upload shop banner
Create 6 initial listings with titles, descriptions, tags, and attributes
Add personalization options to applicable listings
Push products to Etsy via Printify and publish listings
Verify first 3 orders route correctly to Printify
Set up EtsyRank or Everbee for listing analytics
Join Etsy Teams for seller community advice and policy updates
Announce launch to existing audience (Camp Cook / Tight Lines channels)
first_7_days_plan: Day 1: Create Etsy account + Printify account. Connect them. Set production partner.
Day 2: Write shop about, policies, shipping profiles. Upload banner.
Day 3: Create 6 product designs (or confirm with designer). Push via Printify mockup tool.
Day 4: Write and publish first 6 listings. Add tags, attributes, personalization options.
Day 5: Review published listings, fix any issues, verify shipping profiles active.
Day 6: Run test order (buy own product) to verify Printify fulfillment and packaging quality.
Day 7: Analyze test order experience, fix any issues, announce launch to Camp Cook / Tight Lines audience.
